query:
INSERT INTO reservations (
  product_id, product_name, booking_date, people, extras_json,
  amount_total, amount_paid, status, customer_name, customer_email,
  merchant_order, notes, payment_method, channel, created_at, updated_at, paid_at
) VALUES (
  150001,
  'Entrada General Piscina Club Nautico (+3 más)',
  '2026-03-25',
  4,
  '[{"productId":150001,"productName":"Entrada General Piscina Club Nautico","quantity":1,"unitPrice":7.00},{"productId":30007,"productName":"Minimotos Eléctricas Acuáticas","quantity":1,"unitPrice":25.00},{"productId":30002,"productName":"Banana Ski","quantity":1,"unitPrice":15.00},{"productId":30004,"productName":"Canoas & Kayaks","quantity":1,"unitPrice":12.43}]',
  5943,
  5943,
  'paid',
  'Caridad martinez',
  'canales@severalenergy.com',
  'TPV-RES-20260325',
  '[ORIGEN_TPV] Ticket: TPV-20260325-8579 · Cliente: Caridad martinez · Email: canales@severalenergy.com · Productos: Entrada General Piscina Club Nautico, Minimotos Eléctricas Acuáticas, Banana Ski, Canoas & Kayaks',
  'efectivo',
  'tpv',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
